primarySource.label: The Best Decks out of Bologna
primarySource.description: RQ Bologna saw all 28 Legends battle to supremacy, here’s the Best-Of decks and the Top 8!

sources.label: The Best Decks out of Bologna
sources.description: RQ Bologna saw all 28 Legends battle to supremacy, here’s the Best-Of decks and the Top 8!

sources.label: Bologna Regional Qualifier summary page
sources.description: Community summary page used to recover structured legend rows and fallback deck slugs.

eventPrimarySource.label: The Best Decks out of Bologna
eventPrimarySource.description: RQ Bologna saw all 28 Legends battle to supremacy, here’s the Best-Of decks and the Top 8!

decklistSource.label: Sett official best-of decklist
decklistSource.description: Decklist parsed directly from the official Riot/Riftbound event recap.

resolvedCard.name: Akshan - Mischievous
resolvedCard.effect:
[Weaponmaster]
You may pay :rb_rune_body::rb_rune_body: as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, move an enemy gear to your base. You control it until I leave the board. If it's an Equipment, attach it to me.

resolvedCard.name: Fae Dragon
resolvedCard.effect:
When you play me, buff up to four friendly units. (Give each a +1 :rb_might: buff if it doesn't have one.)
When you spend a buff, play a Gold gear token exhausted.

resolvedCard.name: Fiora - Victorious
resolvedCard.effect: While I'm [Mighty], I have [Deflect], [Ganking], and [Shield]. (I'm Mighty while I have 5+ :rb_might:.)

resolvedCard.name: First Mate
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, ready another unit.

resolvedCard.name: Honest Broker
resolvedCard.effect: [Deathknell] — Play a Gold gear token exhausted. (When I die, get the effect.)

resolvedCard.name: Lucian - Merciless
resolvedCard.effect:
[Weaponmaster] (When you play me, you may [Equip] one of your Equipment to me for :rb_rune_rainbow: less, even if it's already attached.)
The first time I conquer each turn, ready me.

resolvedCard.name: Pit Rookie
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, buff another friendly unit. (If it doesn't have a buff, it gets a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

resolvedCard.name: Ruin Runner
resolvedCard.effect: I can't be chosen by enemy spells and abilities.

resolvedCard.name: Call to Glory
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
As you play this, you may spend a buff as an additional cost. If you do, ignore this spell's cost.
Give a unit +3 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Challenge
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Choose a friendly unit and an enemy unit. They deal damage equal to their Mights to each other.

resolvedCard.name: Deathgrip
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Kill a friendly unit. If you do, give +:rb_might: equal to its Might to another friendly unit this turn.
Draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Hidden Blade
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Kill a unit at a battlefield. Its controller draws 2.

resolvedCard.name: Marching Orders
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_3: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Choose a friendly unit anywhere and an enemy unit at a battlefield. They deal damage equal to their Mights to each other.

resolvedCard.name: Punch First
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Give a unit +5 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Sabotage
resolvedCard.effect: Choose an opponent. They reveal their hand. Choose a non-unit card from it, and recycle that card.

resolvedCard.name: Showstopper
resolvedCard.effect: Buff a friendly unit in your base, then move it to a battlefield. (If it doesn't have a buff, it gets a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

resolvedCard.name: Boneshiver
resolvedCard.effect: [Equip] :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_body: (:rb_energy_1::rb_rune_body:: Attach this to a unit you control.)

resolvedCard.name: Warmog's Armor
resolvedCard.effect: [Equip] :rb_rune_body: (:rb_rune_body:: Attach this to a unit you control.)

resolvedCard.name: Monastery of Hirana
resolvedCard.effect: When you conquer here, you may spend a buff to draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Sunken Temple
resolvedCard.effect: When you conquer here with one or more [Mighty] units, you may pay :rb_energy_1: to draw 1. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ :rb_might:.)

resolvedCard.name: The Dreaming Tree
resolvedCard.effect: When a player chooses a friendly unit here with a spell for the first time each turn, they draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Akshan - Mischievous
resolvedCard.effect:
[Weaponmaster]
You may pay :rb_rune_body::rb_rune_body: as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, move an enemy gear to your base. You control it until I leave the board. If it's an Equipment, attach it to me.

resolvedCard.name: Call to Glory
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
As you play this, you may spend a buff as an additional cost. If you do, ignore this spell's cost.
Give a unit +3 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Cannon Barrage
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Deal 2 to all enemy units in combat.

resolvedCard.name: Cull the Weak
resolvedCard.effect: Each player kills one of their units.

resolvedCard.name: Hidden Blade
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Kill a unit at a battlefield. Its controller draws 2.

resolvedCard.name: Sabotage
resolvedCard.effect: Choose an opponent. They reveal their hand. Choose a non-unit card from it, and recycle that card.

resolvedCard.name: Salvage
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
You may kill up to one gear. Draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Unyielding Spirit
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Prevent all spell and ability damage this turn.
